name: Chatni Gashneez ( Coriander Chutney )
recipeInstructions:
1. Pack the chopped coriander leaves firmly into a measuring cup to measure 1 cup.
2. Peel the garlic and chop it roughly. Slit the green chili and remove seeds, then chop roughly.
3. Place the prepared ingredients and walnuts in a blender or food processor container.
4. Process until a textured paste is achieved, adding lemon juice or vinegar gradually while processing.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and chill until ready to serve.
7. Serve with kabaubs.
Note: If you do not have a blender or food processor, pass the ingredients through a fine mesh sieve or chop them finely. Pound the ingredients with a pestle in a mortar. Gradually stir in lemon juice or vinegar and add salt to taste.
